title: zerna ligustica
intro: Zerna ligustica, also known as Wild Marjoram or Sweet Marjoram, is a perennial herb belonging to the mint family. It has been used for centuries for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Zerna ligustica include reducing anxiety and stress, improving respiratory issues, and aiding in digestion. The herbal preparations of Zerna ligustica include teas, infusions, and essential oils, which can be used to relieve symptoms and promote overall well-being.
